feed.title: whimsysoul TikTok
feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from whimsysoul

entry.title: morning coffee 🤝 cute sheep 🐑 . Almost captioned this as "Baa Ram Ewe" but idk if Gen Z will get that reference 🤣 Carmel Mission Ranch Restaurant has been a fave of mine for years. It has the best view in Carmel overlooking green pastures with sheep graz
entry.content: morning coffee 🤝 cute sheep 🐑 . Almost captioned this as "Baa Ram Ewe" but idk if Gen Z will get that reference 🤣 Carmel Mission Ranch Restaurant has been a fave of mine for years. It has the best view in Carmel overlooking green pastures with sheep graz

entry.title: The perfect Carmel weekend itinerary! 🍷 🐟 🐑 🌊 ☕️ 🍝 I love looking at all the cute fairytale houses in Carmel, but I also adore wine tasting down there. 🍷 The Santa Lucia Highlands AVA next door makes some amazing Pinot Noirs (plus Chards and French Styles
entry.content: The perfect Carmel weekend itinerary! 🍷 🐟 🐑 🌊 ☕️ 🍝 I love looking at all the cute fairytale houses in Carmel, but I also adore wine tasting down there. 🍷 The Santa Lucia Highlands AVA next door makes some amazing Pinot Noirs (plus Chards and French Styles

entry.title: There’s a hidden wine region in California 🤫 🍷 that you need to know about!! Santa Lucia Highlands AVA @slhwine makes some of the best Pinot Noir in the state (along with really great Chardonnay and French styles ?) but I’m a Pinot girlie. It’s often over
entry.content: There’s a hidden wine region in California 🤫 🍷 that you need to know about!! Santa Lucia Highlands AVA @slhwine makes some of the best Pinot Noir in the state (along with really great Chardonnay and French styles ?) but I’m a Pinot girlie. It’s often over

entry.title: Day 1 curvy girl outfits in Europe! Just landed in Amsterdam this morning ✈️ changed out of my sweatpants at the airport and into this comfy casual outfit for exploring the city while we wait until we can check in to our hotel. Wearing @Rothy’s flats (lo

entry.title: First time in Amsterdam itinerary for day 1! Walked 7 miles today which didn't feel the best on my jet lagged body but this city is too cute 🇳🇱🌷🧡 #amsterdam #netherlands #amsterdamcity #amsterdamguide #redlightdistrict🚨🚨🚨 #cats #amsterdamfood #willtravelf
entry.content: First time in Amsterdam itinerary for day 1! Walked 7 miles today which didn't feel the best on my jet lagged body but this city is too cute 🇳🇱🌷🧡 #amsterdam #netherlands #amsterdamcity #amsterdamguide #redlightdistrict🚨🚨🚨 #cats #amsterdamfood #willtravelf

entry.title: Amsterdam I have questions about the eggs 🥚 but loved seeing all the different things in your grocery stores! 🧡🥕 #amsterdam #amsterdam🇳🇱 #amsterdamcity #grocerystore #netherlands #holland #dutch #whimsysoul #albertheijn #iamsterdam
entry.content: Amsterdam I have questions about the eggs 🥚 but loved seeing all the different things in your grocery stores! 🧡🥕 #amsterdam #amsterdam🇳🇱 #amsterdamcity #grocerystore #netherlands #holland #dutch #whimsysoul #albertheijn #iamsterdam

entry.title: Day 3 in Amsterdam nursing off a Kings Day hangover but walked over 7 miles in these @Sézane shoes! It was hella windy this weekend in Amsterdam and I absolutely put on a jacket after taking this video since it was chilly! These are the famous gingerbrea
entry.content: Day 3 in Amsterdam nursing off a Kings Day hangover but walked over 7 miles in these @Sézane shoes! It was hella windy this weekend in Amsterdam and I absolutely put on a jacket after taking this video since it was chilly! These are the famous gingerbrea

entry.title: OMG we're ready for you to visit! 😱 Book a stay at the Whimsy Homes cabin - my Airbnb listing link is in my bio 🥰 @Whimsy Homes Cabin I’ve spent all year renovating my old cabin in Arnold, California to turn it from meh to amazing and I can’t believe it’

entry.title: Ditch the sad beige, find your magic! ⭐️ Join me for hidden gems around California & the world, colorful outfits, definitely too much wine and tons of whimsy from your neighborhood ginger. (P.S. there’s a cabin…) @Whimsy Homes Cabin Oh, and more bingo. I

entry.title: Replying to @seanlawn breaking news! Second square is off the world cruise bingo card! Shoutout to @joe for alerting us today. What square do we think will be next? #ultimateworldcruise #worldcruise #bingo #worldcruisebingo #whimysoul #royalcaribbean #cr
